'''matuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xutuli|xutuli]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xutuli|xutuli]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| matuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mætizhith|mætizhith]] || [[word:mætizhij|mætizhij]] || [[word:mætizhish|mætizhish]] || [[word:mætizhi|mætizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:matutuzhuth|matutuzhuth]] || [[word:matutuzhuj|matutuzhuj]] || [[word:matutuzhush|matutuzhush]] || [[word:matutuzhu|matutuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:matuzhuth|matuzhuth]] || [[word:matuzhuj|matuzhuj]] || [[word:matuzhush|matuzhush]] || [[word:matuzhu|matuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:matufzhuth|matufzhuth]] || [[word:matufzhuj|matufzhuj]] || [[word:matufzhush|matufzhush]] || [[word:matufzhuf|matufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:matuzhuthu|matuzhuthu]] || [[word:matuzhuju|matuzhuju]] || [[word:matuzhushu|matuzhushu]] || [[word:matuzhuku|matuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:matuzhuth|matuzhuth]] || [[word:matuzhuj|matuzhuj]] || [[word:matuzhush|matuzhush]] || [[word:matuzhu|matuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:matuzhuthul|matuzhuthul]] || [[word:matuzhujul|matuzhujul]] || [[word:matuzhushul|matuzhushul]] || [[word:matuzhukul|matuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:matuzhuthuthu|matuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:matuzhujuju|matuzhujuju]] || [[word:matuzhushushu|matuzhushushu]] || [[word:matuzhuku|matuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:matuzhuthun|matuzhuthun]] || [[word:matuzhujun|matuzhujun]] || [[word:matuzhushun|matuzhushun]] || [[word:matuzhukun|matuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:matuzhuthuoro|matuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:matuzhujuoro|matuzhujuoro]] || [[word:matuzhushuoro|matuzhushuoro]] || [[word:matuzhukuoro|matuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
